examples: His wild-west origins mean that he has rattlesnake fangs, and unlike European vampires, he is powered by the sun.
One family of completely harmless snakes, the kingsnake, has also evolved serum that neutralizes rattlesnake venom.
Marissa Cooper suddenly pictured the shattered corpse of a rattlesnake lying bloody on a hot patch of yellowTexas sand so many years ago.
Some of his favorites include Rattlesnake Master (Eryngium yuccifolium) and Prairie Blazing Star (Liatris pycnostachya).
Nor does it know why a squirrel waves its tail in front of an angry rattlesnake.
